title: Oeosporangium subvillosum
taxonomy: Oeosporangium subvillosum is classified as a species of lycophyte, specifically within the family Oeosporangiaceae. It belongs to the class Psilotopsida, and further classified as an order Psilotales. This classification places it within the division Lycopodiophyta, which is a group of vascular plants that reproduce via spores. Oeosporangium subvillosum is closely related to other lycophytes, which are also known as club mosses. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships between different species within the plant kingdom.
